edge_role: names the still-blocked downstream edge after the restricted target constructor witness
required_source: actual restricted target to ZeroDayClosure theorem or witness, still absent
positive_claim: records the next bounded downstream edge target after the restricted composition target constructor audit
missing_object: actual witness or theorem for RestrictedCompositionTarget -> ZeroDayClosure
non_claims: does not construct an unrestricted zero-day closure
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Inventory the obligations required for a restricted-target-to-ZeroDayClosure edge while keeping the edge unconstructed.
